title: Investment Immigration - Green & Spiegel
content:
## Investment Immigration
Home > U.S Immigration-2 > U.S. Immigration > Investment-Based Immigration > Investors and Entrepreneurs > Investment Immigration

## Owned and operated by Toronto-based law firm Green and Spiegel, our team has represented investors and entrepreneurs seeking immigration benefits for over 50 years.
Our practice includes five partners, 19 associates and an incredible support staff of 70.  We are a truly multicultural organization and our staff are able to assist our clients in over 30 different languages, including English, French, Mandarin, Russian, and Spanish. The immigration lawyers of Green and Spiegel U.S. take great pride in helping individuals and businesses succeed by connecting them with the right immigration programs based on their needs and circumstances. Offering global solutions, our clientele may select from a range of immigration options matched by no others in the industry.
International immigration policies, practices and systems are complex. Our team includes certified specialists, immigration educators, award winners, and published authors. Green and Spiegel U.S. provides all the benefits of a large firm, while maintaining the individualized service of a boutique firm that has a demonstrated track record of success in all areas of immigration law.
We pride ourselves as advocates. Our extensive experience and expertise puts us in the best position to handle even the most challenging cases on behalf of our clients. We have participated in many of the most significant cases in immigration law . Given our role as industry thought leaders, we are oftentimes called upon as expert witnesses in litigation or invited to meetings with immigration policymakers. We are not afraid to challenge the government in cases where necessary and we step up to the challenge in assisting clients whose cases may have been mishandled by less experienced firms. We are proud to foster a culture of compassion, and participate in philanthropy and pro bono cases.
As a firm built on word of mouth and client recommendations, we take pride in our strong ties to international organizations, international businesses and community groups. Green and Spiegel U.S. has carefully built an unparalleled reputation as the firm of choice for clients across the entire spectrum of immigration law, with a unique experience in representing investors and entrepreneurs like yourself.
